Hook a class.description: Open a %hook block for an existing class

Group of hooks.description: Declare a hook group (initialize it later with %init)

Constructor.description: Anonymous constructor, run when the tweak loads

Destructor.description: Anonymous destructor, run when the tweak unloads

New method.description: Add a new method to a hooked class or subclass

New method with type encoding.description: Add a new method with an explicit Objective-C type encoding

Class lookup.description: Resolve a class by name at runtime

Call original.description: Call the original hooked method or function

Call original with arguments.description: Call the original with explicit arguments

Log arguments.description: Dump the current method's arguments to syslog

Tweak scaffold.description: Basic %hook scaffold with one overridden method
